data.content: Shipment review approved: origin/main is at 835f1b3705f3 (live HEAD 835f1b37). Knot tag commit:835f1b3705f3 is present. Verified src/components/app-header-parts.tsx returns null for beatsView="finalcut", while the ViewSwitcher still defines the Escalations tab.
